JSON schema for Pebble project and appinfo JSON files, defining properties and required fields.

# Purpose
The JSON schema defines the structure and validation rules for Pebble project JSON files. It specifies two main sections: `package-json` and `appinfo-json`. The `package-json` section outlines properties such as `name`, `author`, `version`, and `dependencies`, ensuring that each project file includes these essential attributes. The `appinfo-json` section includes properties like `uuid`, `shortName`, `longName`, and `companyName`, which are required for identifying and describing the application. The schema uses references to external JSON files for certain properties, ensuring consistency and reusability across different project types and configurations.
